name: Cyberpunk
description: Futuristic neon-lit urban environment with advanced technology, holographic displays, and cybernetic enhancements

name: Medieval Fantasy
description: Ancient castles, magical forests, knights in armor, and mystical creatures in a fantasy realm

name: Steampunk
description: Victorian-era inspired world with steam-powered machinery, brass gears, and mechanical contraptions

name: Space Opera
description: Cosmic setting with starships, alien worlds, space stations, and interstellar adventures

name: Post-Apocalyptic
description: Wasteland environment with ruins, scavenged materials, and survival themes

name: Underwater Kingdom
description: Deep ocean realm with coral reefs, bioluminescent creatures, and aquatic civilizations

name: Crystal Cave
description: Mystical underground caverns filled with glowing crystals and mineral formations

name: Volcanic Forge
description: Molten lava environment with volcanic activity, fire, and intense heat

name: Ice Palace
description: Frozen kingdom with ice sculptures, snow-covered landscapes, and crystalline structures

name: Jungle Temple
description: Ancient ruins overgrown with vegetation, mysterious artifacts, and tropical wildlife

name: Desert Oasis
description: Arid landscape with sand dunes, palm trees, and hidden water sources

name: Sky City
description: Floating city among the clouds with aerial platforms and wind-powered technology
